heading: Multirater assessment of certain personnel
label: 2182 Multirater assessment of certain personnel

children.heading: Multirater Assessment of Certain Personnel.—
children.label: a Multirater Assessment of Certain Personnel.—
A
children.text: Each flag officer of the Coast Guard.

children.label: B
children.text: Each member of the Senior Executive Service of the Coast Guard.

children.label: C
children.text: Each officer of the Coast Guard nominated for promotion to the grade of flag officer.

children.heading: .—Selection
children.label: 4 .—Selection
children.text: An individual assessed shall not be permitted to select the peers and subordinates who provide opinions for the multirater assessment of such individual.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: A .—In general
children.text: Following an assessment of an individual pursuant to paragraphs (1) through (3), the individual shall be provided appropriate post-assessment counseling and leadership coaching.

children.heading: .—Availability of results
children.label: B .—Availability of results
children.text: The supervisor of the individual assessed shall be provided with the results of the multirater assessment.

children.heading: .—Multirater Assessment Defined
children.label: b .—Multirater Assessment Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “multirater assessment” means a review that seeks opinion from members senior to the reviewee and the peers and subordinates of the reviewee.
